Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class BigDecimalVerifierNoOp

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp<S,​T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableVerifierNoOp<S,​T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractNumberVerifierNoOp<BigDecimalVerifier,​BigDecimal>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.BigDecimalVerifierNoOp
All Implemented Interfaces:
BigDecimalVerifier, ExtensibleComparableVerifier<BigDecimalVerifier,​BigDecimal>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<BigDecimalVerifier,​BigDecimal>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<BigDecimalVerifier,​BigDecimal>
public final class BigDecimalVerifierNoOp
extends AbstractNumberVerifierNoOp<BigDecimalVerifier,​BigDecimal>
implements BigDecimalVerifier
A BigDecimalVerifier that does nothing.
